name: Mid-Kansas
description_short: Mid-Kansas Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering deposit accounts, loans, and debit card services to members across Kansas.
description_long: Mid-Kansas Credit Union is a federally-chartered, member-owned credit union operating under NCUA insurance. The organization provides traditional credit union services including share accounts, certificates of deposit, and various loan products to its membership base across Kansas. The credit union maintains an online banking platform (MK Net) and physical branch presence with ATM access through surcharge-free networks. Mid-Kansas Credit Union offers competitive rates on deposit products and multiple loan categories tailored to different borrowing needs. The institution distinguishes itself through personalized debit card services (myPic Studio), allowing members to customize their cards with personal photos, and by offering specialized agricultural lending with dedicated loan officers. They also provide rewards programs through ScoreCard and dispute resolution services for Visa transactions. What sets them apart is their focus on member customization and agricultural lending support, indicating a regional emphasis on serving farming communities. As a credit union, Mid-Kansas operates on a not-for-profit basis with profits returned to members through rates and services rather than shareholder distributions. However, the website content provided is limited to product overviews and does not detail membership eligibility requirements, branch locations, full fee schedules, or comprehensive loan terms, which would be important factors for prospective members to evaluate.
services: Money Market Shares with up to 1.00% APY
Certificates of Deposit up to 3.50% APY
Agricultural loans with dedicated loan officers
MyPic Studio customized debit cards with $10 production fee
Online banking via MK Net platform
pros: Competitive CD rates up to 3.50% APY as advertised on homepage
Personalized myPic Studio debit cards allowing custom photo uploads
Dedicated agricultural loan officers for farm-related financing
Surcharge-free ATM access through network partnership
ScoreCard rewards program for debit card transactions
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure returns profits to members
Online banking platform (MK Net) with password recovery and loan payment options
cons: $10 production fee charged each time a myPic Studio debit card is issued (including replacements)
Limited transparency on membership eligibility and enrollment requirements on public website
Auto loan rates starting at 7.25% APR are not notably competitive compared to other lenders
Website content truncated for myPic terms and conditions, suggesting incomplete product documentation
best_for: Kansas farmers and agricultural business owners seeking specialized lending support
Existing credit union members seeking competitive CD and money market rates
Individuals wanting customized debit cards with personal photos
diagnosis: Mid-Kansas Credit Union is best for Kansas-based individuals and agricultural businesses seeking membership in a traditional, member-owned credit union with competitive deposit rates and agricultural lending expertise. Primary caveat: membership eligibility, specific terms, and full fee schedules are not detailed on the public website, requiring direct contact to determine if you qualify and understand all costs.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
